creator: robak@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to freebsd-ports from comment #3)

Yes, you can - as I said in my earlier comment, you need to adapt your port submission to today's standards, which I've mentioned. Please, refer to Porters Handbook here: https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/ and join #bsdports on Efnet: https://wiki.freebsd.org/IrcChannels
